title: crotalaria dissitiflora
intro: Crotalaria dissitiflora, also known as the scattered-flowered rattlebox, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family that is native to South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria dissitiflora include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Crotalaria dissitiflora is often prepared for herbal use by making a tea infusion from the leaves and stems, or by using the roots and stems to make a decoction.
